zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Richard Blount於1459年出生在英國武斯特斯爾索丁頓時，他的父親John Blount32歲，母親Catherine Corbet31歲。他於1470年與Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Richard Blount于1459年出生在英国武斯特斯爾索丁頓时，他的父亲John Blount32岁，母亲Catherine Corbet31岁。他于1470年与Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1527年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Richard Blount was born in 1459, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Blount, was 32 and his mother, Catherine Corbet, was 31. He married Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall in 1470, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1527, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Richard Blount est né en 1459, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Blount, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Corbet, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall en 1470, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1527, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Richard Blount 1459 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Blount 32 und seine Mutter Catherine Corbet 31. Er hat 1470 in Shropshire, England Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1527 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Richard Blount è nato il nel 1459 nel Sodington, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Blount, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Corbet, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall nel 1470, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1527, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Richard Blountが1459年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで生まれた時，父John Blountは32歳，母Catherine Corbetは31歳であった。1470年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLady Anne Juliana Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1527年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Richard Blount(이)가 1459년 영국 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blount(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Corbet(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Richard Blount nasceu em 1459, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Blount, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Corbet, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall em 1470, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1527, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Richard Blount родился в 1459 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Blount было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Corbet, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall в 1470 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1527 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Richard Blount nació en 1459, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Blount, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Catherine Corbet, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Juliana Cornwall en 1470, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1527, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
